minimum_requirements.windows: 10 or newer for the documented PowerShell local CLI path

warnings: alpha prerelease manifest; not the stable CLI Local Runtime release
production signature verification is not available in this public manifest
manual ZIP install requires the user to extract the archive and run local commands
install.ps1 is a plan-only skeleton and does not install anything
install-local.ps1 is plan-first and only installs into .venv when -Execute is explicit
no remote execution installer is included
no PATH mutation is performed by default
official account sync remains contract/fixture only in the public repo
OpenAI shared traffic remains disabled by default
self-evolution remains proposal-only and does not mutate code or releases
